measurement: Mid-far Hit-Rate-ON replication window for soda-twinkling-bunny - owner hand count from a SECOND video, scored against the PRE-REGISTERED predictions of the drawn-geometry model (sg-drawn-geometry.json)
status: REPLICATION SCORED - the model's pre-registered prediction WINS on both observables; the original mid-far ON core outlier does NOT reproduce. Findings-only; NOTHING ENACTED.
countedBy: owner, same counting rule as soda-tb-sg-core-hr-windows.json section 2

preRegistered.source: sg-drawn-geometry.json openItems (written before this count existed)

verdict.core: 0.0296 vs model 0.0354 -> z = -0.36. The model's prediction wins decisively over the outlier hypothesis (~0.08).
verdict.landing: 0.750 vs model 0.728 -> z = +0.65, inside the pre-registered band.
verdict.originalOutlier: the first window's 0.0786 (11/140) does not reproduce; the two windows differ at ~1.8 sigma; POOLED mid-far ON core = 15/275 = 0.0545 vs model 0.0354 -> z = 1.71, unremarkable across 18 cells.
verdict.fitUpdate: re-fit with both replication cells added: k = 1.04, eps = 0.960 - IDENTICAL to the 16-cell fit; deviance 25.4 on 16 dof (GOF p ~ 0.064). No cell exceeds 2 sigma except the original mid-far window's core, now explained as a fluctuation.

modelStateAfterThis: The uniform-in-circle model (sg-drawn-geometry.json formalFit_16cell) stands with NO unexplained cells: pellets uniform per area in the screen-fixed aim circle (R 79.3 px -> 48.2 px at Hit Rate 38.91), landing = range-scaled silhouette coverage x eps 0.96, core = range-scaled core disc share. Evidence: (1) zero-fitted-parameter landing check, (2) 18-cell likelihood fit, (3) machine-read per-pellet positions (sg-pellet-marker-radial.json), (4) this pre-registered replication.
